Codepliant
PricingDocsGitHub

Documentation

Get started with Codepliant in under a minute.

Quick start

# Install globally

npm install -g codepliant

# Or run directly with npx

npx codepliant go

Run codepliant go in your project directory. Codepliant will scan your codebase and generate all applicable compliance documents in a codepliant-output/ directory.

Commands

codepliant go

Scan your codebase and generate all compliance documents.

codepliant scan

Scan only. Output detected services and data practices as JSON.

codepliant generate

Generate documents from a previous scan result.

Supported ecosystems

Node.js / TypeScript
Python / Django
Ruby on Rails
Go
Java / Spring
PHP / Laravel
Rust
.NET / C#
React / Next.js
